收尾清单 End-of-Version Checklist

5月27日版本收尾清单：Hotori池、Whisker Patrol、兑换码与6月3日前必做事项 May 27 Closing Checklist: Hotori Banner, Whisker Patrol, Codes and Must-Do Tasks Before June 3

发布时间：Published: 2026-05-27 作者：异环攻略站编辑部Author: NTE Guide Editorial Team 阅读时间：10 分钟Read time: 10 min

攻略速览

从 2026 年 5 月 27 日开始，1.0 最后一周同时存在三条倒计时：Whisker Patrol 于 5 月 27 日 12:00 开启并在 6 月 3 日 04:59 结束；Hotori 限定板和 S 级弧盘「Marching Beyond Time」研究计划持续到 6 月 3 日 05:59；1.1「Dreamwalk Corridor」则在 6 月 3 日上线。收尾阶段的优先级应从“还能刷什么”改为“什么过期后无法补”：活动积分、邮件奖励、兑换码、抽卡垫数记录、活动商店、传送点和通用材料库存。

前置条件与接取方式

活动窗口

Whisker Patrol：2026-05-27 12:00 至 2026-06-03 04:59（UTC+8）

池子窗口

Hotori 与 Marching Beyond Time：持续至 2026-06-03 05:59（UTC+8）

版本目标

6 月 3 日前清掉限时奖励，保留 1.1 抽卡与通用养成资源

最后一周执行表

按过期时间排序

1

每天先刷 Whisker Patrol 150 分

单人优先，积分满后立刻停

活动每日 05:00 刷新上限，每天最多 150 分。普通异常体、加鲁达成员和高风险异常都能给分，但多人模式普通怪只给最后一击玩家，高风险异常多人击败不计活动积分。稳定做法是单人先满分，再处理日常。

2

记录 Hotori 池最终状态

抽或不抽都要记下限定池垫数

Hotori 池 6 月 3 日 05:59 结束。准备跳过的玩家应记录当前限定池抽数，给 1.1 上半 Lacrimosa 预算；准备补本体或外观的玩家，要在 6 月 3 日前完成，不要等到版本切换后再找入口。

3

弧盘池只做最后确认

Tri-Keys 不够保底时不要临时上头

Marching Beyond Time 同样在 6 月 3 日 05:59 结束。若 Hotori 已确定长期进队且 Tri-Keys 接近保底，可以考虑补；若只是因为池子快结束而冲动下池，应优先把 Tri-Keys 留给 1.1 新弧盘。

4

兑换码分两批处理

先领当前可用码，再把 1.1 直播码设为 6 月 25 日前必领

当前通用码可先在手机菜单的兑换入口处理，奖励从邮箱领取。1.1 已公开 DREAMWALK0603、TOMATO100、RACENOLIMIT 三个码，有效期到 6 月 25 日，版本更新后应第一时间兑换。

5

体力转向通用库存

角色突破、技能、武器、方斯和经验材料优先

6 月 3 日前不建议把体力压到未经确认的新角色专属方向。通用材料、方斯和经验一定会消耗；极限副词条、冷门属性本和重复探索查漏可放到 1.1 主线与活动入口打开后再补。

收尾风险

最后一天把多个截止时间混在一起

6 月 3 日有多个关键节点相邻：Whisker Patrol 04:59 结束，Hotori 与当前弧盘研究 05:59 结束，1.1 上线后新活动和新池接力。最容易出错的是把所有事情都留到最后一天，结果活动积分、商店或池子奖励漏领。

  • 6 月 2 日晚上前至少完成一次完整查漏，不要把活动积分和商店兑换压到 6 月 3 日清晨。
  • 所有抽卡决策提前一天做完，最后一天只做确认，不做临时追抽。
  • 邮箱、活动页、兑换码、商店、弧盘研究和限定板分别检查，避免只看主界面红点。

完成奖励

150分日上限 Hotori垫数记录 弧盘池止损 兑换码收益 1.1通用库存

1.0 最后一周的最优路线很简单：每天先拿 Whisker Patrol，6 月 2 日前完成 Hotori 与弧盘决策，版本前只囤通用资源。不要在截止日前把抽卡、活动和探索全部堆到同一晚。

完整解析

5 月 27 日是 1.0 收尾节奏正式变紧的一天。Whisker Patrol 开始后，玩家每天都有一个明确的 150 分上限；同时 Hotori 和当前专属弧盘只剩到 6 月 3 日 05:59。这个阶段最重要的不是再开新坑，而是把所有会关闭的入口逐个处理掉。

Whisker Patrol 应该放在每日第一优先级，因为它有日上限且持续时间短。多人模式虽然清怪快，但积分归属不稳定，高风险异常多人击败还不计积分。想稳拿奖励，就用单人路线先把 150 分做完，再回去刷材料或探索。

抽卡方面，不抽 Hotori 也不是空过。你需要记录当前限定池进度，因为这会影响 1.1 Lacrimosa 的预算。已经抽到 Hotori 的玩家，不要因为池子快结束就默认追专属弧盘；只有确定长期使用且 Tri-Keys 接近保底时，补弧盘才更合理。

兑换码要分清当前码和 1.1 码。当前可用码用于补方斯、环石和材料，能领就先领；DREAMWALK0603、TOMATO100、RACENOLIMIT 是 1.1 公开码，有效期到 6 月 25 日，版本更新后应优先处理，避免被新剧情和抽卡分散注意力。

6 月 3 日前的体力建议保守使用。角色突破、技能书、武器突破、经验和方斯都属于低风险资源；而新角色专属材料、未确认配队方向和极限副词条，都可以等 1.1 实装后再决定。收尾阶段的目标是降低新版本第一天的补课成本。

Guide Snapshot

Starting May 27, 2026, Version 1.0 has three overlapping countdowns: Whisker Patrol opens at 12:00 and ends June 3 at 04:59 (UTC+8); Hotori's limited board and the Marching Beyond Time S-Class Arc Research run until June 3 at 05:59; Version 1.1 Dreamwalk Corridor follows on June 3. The final-week priority is not what can be farmed forever, but what expires: event points, mail, codes, banner pity records, shops, teleports and universal materials.

Requirements and Entry

Event window

Whisker Patrol: May 27, 2026 12:00 to June 3, 2026 04:59 (UTC+8)

Banner window

Hotori and Marching Beyond Time end June 3, 2026 05:59 (UTC+8)

Version goal

Clear limited rewards and preserve 1.1 pull and growth resources

Final-Week Checklist

Sort by expiry time

1

Cap Whisker Patrol first each day

Solo first, stop when capped.

The event resets at 05:00 and allows up to 150 points per day. Multiplayer ordinary enemies only score for the final-hit player, and high-risk anomalies give no event points in multiplayer.

2

Record Hotori banner status

Whether you pull or skip, write down limited-banner pity.

Hotori ends on June 3 at 05:59. Skippers should carry the record into Lacrimosa planning; pullers should finish decisions before the version switch.

3

Confirm the Arc banner calmly

Do not chase Marching Beyond Time just because the banner is ending.

If Hotori is a long-term core and your Tri-Keys are near guarantee, consider it. Otherwise, keeping Tri-Keys for 1.1 is usually safer.

4

Handle codes in two batches

Redeem current codes now, then claim 1.1 codes before June 25.

Use the phone menu redemption entry and claim rewards from mail. DREAMWALK0603, TOMATO100 and RACENOLIMIT are announced 1.1 codes that expire June 25.

5

Move stamina to universal stock

Ascension, skills, weapons, Fons and EXP first.

Before 1.1 lands, avoid over-farming unconfirmed new-character materials. Universal resources are the safest final-week stamina target.

Closing Risk

Mixing several June 3 deadlines

Whisker Patrol ends at 04:59, Hotori and the current Arc Research end at 05:59, and 1.1 content follows. Leaving everything to the final morning is the easiest way to miss rewards.

  • Do a full limited-reward sweep on the evening of June 2.
  • Make pull decisions one day early; use the last day only for confirmation.
  • Check mail, event pages, shops, code redemption, Arc Research and the limited board separately.

Rewards

150 daily points Hotori pity record Arc-banner stop-loss Redeem-code value 1.1 universal stock

The clean final-week route is simple: cap Whisker Patrol daily, finish Hotori and Arc decisions before June 3, and spend pre-version stamina on universal resources.

Full Analysis

May 27 is when the 1.0 closing schedule tightens. Whisker Patrol adds a daily 150-point task while Hotori and the current signature Arc approach their June 3 cutoff.

Whisker Patrol should be the first daily task because it has a short duration and daily cap. Solo routes are more reliable than multiplayer scoring.

Skipping Hotori still requires action: record your limited-banner progress because it affects the Lacrimosa budget. Players who own Hotori should not automatically chase her signature Arc unless the budget supports it.

Separate current usable codes from 1.1 livestream codes. DREAMWALK0603, TOMATO100 and RACENOLIMIT should be redeemed after the update and before June 25.

Use final-week stamina conservatively. Ascension, skill books, weapon upgrades, EXP and Fons are low-risk; unconfirmed specialized farming can wait for 1.1 implementation.
